name: Minerva Gold Inc.
business: The company historically focused on mineral property exploration. It has entered into a letter of intent to acquire Taizhou Sentian, which manufactures sanitary ware/bathroom fixtures.

catalysts.event: Completion of definitive agreement for acquisition of Taizhou Sentian
catalysts.sentence: The definitive agreement is expected to be completed by approximately May 31, 2026, following the completion of certain administrative actions required by applicable Chinese law, with a closing to occur shortly thereafter.
